headlines.headline: Stephen A.: Celtics sent a message in win over Thunder
headlines.description: Stephen A. Smith praises the Celtics for their win over the Thunder on Wednesday night.

headlines.headline: Why Draymond loved and hated Wemby's MVP comments

headlines.headline: Kawhi Leonard scores 27 as the Clippers beat the Raptors 119-94
headlines.description: — Kawhi Leonard had 27 points, Darius Garland added 24, and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Toronto Raptors 119-94 on Wednesday night.

headlines.headline: Surging Hawks snap the East-leading Pistons' 4-game winning streak with a 130-129 win in overtime
headlines.description: — CJ McCollum scored 27 points, making the tiebreaking three-point play in overtime, and the Atlanta Hawks beat the Detroit Pistons 130-129 on Wednesday night.

headlines.headline: Tom Brady says he asked NFL about possible comeback
headlines.description: Tom Brady says he explored the possibility of coming out of retirement and returning to the NFL, adding that the league did not "like that idea very much."

headlines.headline: Will the Jets take a chance on drafting Ty Simpson?

headlines.headline: Alabama QB Ty Simpson says he's 'absolutely' a 1st-round pick
headlines.description: Ty Simpson felt like he made a final impression at Alabama's pro day in front of NFL scouts. He believes he's 'absolutely' a lock to be a first-round pick.

headlines.headline: Trust the process: 25 trends to know before your fantasy football draft

headlines.headline: NHL playoff standings: How will the Pacific Division finish?

headlines.headline: Pavel Zacha scores 38 seconds into OT to give the Bruins a 4-3 win over the Sabres
headlines.description: — Paval Zacha scored 38 seconds into overtime, David Pastrnak had a goal and two assists and the Boston Bruins rallied for a 4-3 win over the Atlantic Division-leading Buffalo Sabres on Wednesday night.

headlines.headline: Maple Leafs beat Rangers 4-3, eliminating New York from playoff contention
headlines.description: — Dakota Joshua had a goal and an assist, Joseph Woll made 40 saves and added an assist, and the Toronto Maple Leafs topped the Rangers 4-3 on Wednesday night, eliminating New York from playoff contention.
